description_long: This object is a bunch of garlic bulbs tied together at the top with a natural-looking stem remnant. The garlic bulbs are plump, with each bulb composed of several distinct, rounded cloves that are tightly packed together. The surface of the bulbs is covered in a white, papery skin that appears mostly intact, giving the garlic a slightly matte and rough texture. The stem at the top is cylindrical, light brown, and wrapped with a thin band, suggesting it has been prepared for hanging or storage. The bottom of the bulbs shows the base of the cloves, but the root tufts are not visible. The overall appearance is realistic, with clear segmentation between the cloves and a natural, organic form.
description: A bunch of tightly packed garlic bulbs with a papery white skin and a tied stem remnant at the top, showing clear clove segmentation.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the garlic bunch, showing the rounded contours of the cloves and the tied stem at the top.
description_view_1: This view presents a more frontal perspective, emphasizing the symmetry and tight packing of the garlic cloves.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite side, revealing the bases of the cloves and the absence of visible root tufts.
description_view_3: This view displays the back of the garlic bunch, with the tops of the cloves and the stem remnant most prominent.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb is partially separated into individual cloves, with 10-12 visible segments. The segmentation is clear and distinct, with each clove outlined by shallow grooves.
attribute_clove_arrangement: The cloves are tightly packed in a regular, spiral-like arrangement around the central axis, forming a compact and symmetrical bunch.
attribute_stem_remnant: present, short and cylindrical, light brown with a wrapped appearance
